opdate.text: วันที่อนุมัติ

root.sql:
SELECT PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as memname , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname , PKA_LON_REQSRV.fp_calc_agetext( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth, localtimestamp) as age, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control) as group_control, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.sex , sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_code , sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_id , sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_amount , sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_amount , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date , sc_mem_m_application_form.approve_id
, ( select sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount from sc_com_m_receipt , sc_com_m_receipt_item where ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'MFE' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0') as item_amount
, ( select count( tb_mem_female.membership_no ) from sc_mem_m_membership_registered tb_mem_female , sc_mem_m_application_form tb_app_female where tb_mem_female.application_form_no = tb_app_female.application_form_no and ( tb_mem_female.approve_date between ('!opdate_1!')::timestamp and ('!opdate_2!')::timestamp ) and tb_mem_female.sex = 'F' ) as c_female
, ( select count( tb_mem_male.membership_no ) from sc_mem_m_membership_registered tb_mem_male , sc_mem_m_application_form tb_app_male where tb_mem_male.application_form_no = tb_app_male.application_form_no and ( tb_mem_male.approve_date between ('!opdate_1!')::timestamp and ('!opdate_2!')::timestamp ) and tb_mem_male.sex = 'M' ) as c_male
FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_member_work_info , sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_mem_m_ucf_position , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_com_m_branch , sc_mem_m_application_form
WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_position.position_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.branch_id = sc_com_m_branch.branch_id ) and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date between ('!opdate_1!')::timestamp and ('!opdate_2!')::timestamp) /*WHERE*/
